creator: pg@2lazy.ru
text:
îÅllo,

> Finally, I confirm that adding -march=native to CFLAGS when building
libdrm fixes the issue.

I've digget this a bit..
Seems that -march=native is not suitable for "generic" configuration of
ports, but I found that -march=i486 is enough to compile graphics/libdrm
with Intel support.

Since i386 support is dropped anyway, seems that a patch like attached
will do the trick.

-- 
Pavel Gubin
